hero.h1: 26 years bringing Uruguayan quality to the world.
hero.lead: Grupo Saturno integrates cattle production, meat processing, and commercialization. A reliable partner for those who understand that quality is built at every link in the chain.

units.unit1Desc: [CONTENT TO BE CONFIRMED WITH CLIENT] — Specialised processing with a focus on export and premium domestic market.
units.unit2Desc: Integrated production and processing with full traceability from origin. Core of the group.

about.label: The Group
about.body: Grupo Saturno is a Uruguayan company with 26 years of experience in the production, processing, and commercialization of beef. From our fields in Empalme Olmos to tables around the world, every step takes place under the same standard: consistency, traceability, and human commitment.

mvv.label: Purpose
mvv.mision: Bringing Uruguayan quality and essence to the world.
mvv.vision: To be recognised for our empathy, integrity, and reliability, building strategic and lasting relationships.

valores.desc: Every production cycle as an opportunity to improve.
Sustained effort as the only true guarantee.
26 years demand knowing when to change course.
To the product, the team, and the client.
Understanding others is integral to doing business.

product.label: Proof of capacity
product.subtitle: Product photography, facilities, and logistics.
product.spec1Text: International standard cuts and traditional Uruguayan cuts.
product.spec2Text: Fresh · Frozen · Vacuum packed · Boxed beef
product.spec3Text: HACCP · EU Approval · China GACC · Halal · Kosher

chain.label: Vertical integration
chain.h2: From the land to the table, without intermediaries.

items.title: Full integration
items.text: We produce, process, and commercialise. Real control at every stage of the chain.

items.title: Consistent quality
items.text: No intermediaries to compromise the result. We know the product from its very origin.

items.title: Scale with proximity
items.text: Industrial capacity, human treatment. We are both — not one or the other.

items.title: International outlook
items.text: Evolving towards global markets with standards aligned to external requirements.

contact.label: Commercial contact
contact.h2: Let us discuss a long-term partnership.
contact.lead: If you represent an importing company, distributor, or food sector business, we invite you to learn more about us.

footer.desc: A Uruguayan company with 26 years of experience in the production, processing, and commercialization of beef.

meta.homeTitle: Grupo Saturno — Beef Production & Processing | Uruguay
meta.homeDesc: 26 years of experience in cattle farming, meat processing, and international commercialization. Empalme Olmos, Uruguay.
meta.saturnoDesc: Core production unit of Grupo Saturno. Integrated processing with full traceability from origin.
